'''Bedamyr''' was a male [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] charged with protecting [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He owned pet [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] which he occasionally lost. He worked with [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].

{{Char-stub}}
